config.title: Informacje #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50122" #include "50518"
dim g_dDateToday : g_dDateToday = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)
function c##CTRLID_DATE_TODAY##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_dDateToday end function function c##CTRLID_DATE_TODAY##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl,byval newValue) g_dDateToday = newValue c##CTRLID_DATE_TODAY##_ondataentered = true end function
function fopen() : fopen = true dim pM60293 : set pM60293 = doc_.getmodule(60293) pM60293.clean_uncomplete_documents display_info end function
function display_info() display_info_for_date g_dDateToday end function
function display_info_for_date(byval dDate) dim curCash dim curCard dim curTotal
dim strQuery0 : strQuery0 = "select isnull(sum(isnull(t_sprz.curSumaBrutto,0)) - sum(isnull(t_orgsprz.curSumaBrutto,0)),0) " +_ "from n5sprzedaz t_sprz left outer join n5sprzedaz t_orgsprz on t_sprz.ppopsprzed = t_orgsprz.idobj " +_ "where t_sprz.pRozlVAT<>0 and t_sprz.dDataWyst = %1 " strQuery0 = trans_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQuery0).add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDate)).done()
dim strQuery dim oRS
strQuery = strQuery0 +_ " and t_sprz.pSposobPlatnosci in (select idobj from n5sposplat where eTyp=N5SPOSPLAT_GOTOWKA)" set oRS = trans_.createadors(strQuery) curCash = ccur(oRS(0).value)
strQuery = strQuery0 +_ " and t_sprz.pSposobPlatnosci in (select idobj from n5sposplat where eTyp=N5SPOSPLAT_KARTA)" set oRS = trans_.createadors(strQuery) curCard = ccur(oRS(0).value)
set oRS = trans_.createadors(strQuery0) curTotal = ccur(oRS(0).value)
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SALES_CASH).value = doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(curCash) ,"") page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SALES_CARD).value = doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(curCard) ,"") page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SALES_TOTAL).value = doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(curTotal) ,"")
dim idGrProdTN : idGrProdTN = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,"strNazwa='TERRANOVA'") dim idGrProdRN : idGrProdRN = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,"strNazwa='RINASCIMENTO'") dim idGrProdKOS : idGrProdKOS = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,"strNazwa='KOSMETYKI'")
if idGrProdTN <= 0 or idGrProdRN <= 0 or idGrProdKOS <= 0 then exit function end if strQuery0 = "select 'c_ilosc' = isnull(sum(isnull(t_0.c_curiloscopak,0) - isnull(t_orgsprz.c_curiloscopak,0)),0) " +_ " from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje t_0 " +_ " join n5produkt t_prod on t_0.c_pprodukt = t_prod.idobj " +_ " left outer join vlist_n5sprzedaz_listpozycje t_orgsprz on t_0.p_ppopsprzed = t_orgsprz.p_idobj and t_0.coll_lp = t_orgsprz.coll_lp "+_ " where t_0.p_ddatawyst = " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDate) +_ " and t_0.p_prejestrdok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in(N5REJESTRDOK_PARAGON,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_PARAGON))"
set oRS = trans_.createadors(strQuery0 + " and t_prod.pGrupaProd = " + cstr(idGrProdTN)) dim curQtyTN: curQtyTN = ccur(oRS("c_ilosc")) set oRS = trans_.createadors(strQuery0 + " and t_prod.pGrupaProd = " + cstr(idGrProdRN)) dim curQtyRN : curQtyRN = ccur(oRS("c_ilosc")) set oRS = trans_.createadors(strQuery0 + " and t_prod.pGrupaProd = " + cstr(idGrProdKOS)) dim curQtyKOS : curQtyKOS = ccur(oRS("c_ilosc"))
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_QTY_TN).value = doc_.afc.display.quantity ( ccur(curQtyTN) ,"",0) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_QTY_RN).value = doc_.afc.display.quantity ( ccur(curQtyRN) ,"",0) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_QTY_KOS).value = doc_.afc.display.quantity ( ccur(curQtyKOS) ,"",0) end function
function paragon_zbiorczy() paragon_zbiorczy_etc false end function
function paragon_zbiorczy_zwroty() paragon_zbiorczy_etc true end function
function paragon_zbiorczy_etc(byval bKorekta) dim pResultHLI dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() dim pRaportMomentParam : set pRaportMomentParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date("Analizowany moment").bindexpr("") pRaportMomentParam.first_value = g_dDateToday pRaportMomentParam.mode = clng(1) pParamArray.add pRaportMomentParam dim oRaportTypeParam : set oRaportTypeParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_int("typ").bindexpr("") if bKorekta then oRaportTypeParam.first_value = clng(1) else oRaportTypeParam.first_value = clng(0) end if pParamArray.add oRaportTypeParam
set pResultHLI = asp_raport_appfile_hli(95171,pParamArray) dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli(pResultHLI) pPage.domodalauto() end function
function raport_kasowy() dim idOther : idOther = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5RAPKAS,_ "raka_dDataDo >= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(g_dDateToday) + " and " +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(g_dDateToday) + " >= raka_dDataOd") if idOther > 0 then 'dim hli:set hli = doc_.getmodule(60129).prepare_form_open_command(TYPEID_N5RAPKAS , idOther , USAGE_EDIT) 'dim form 'if not hli is nothing then ' set form = doc_.getpagehli(hli) ' form.domodalauto ' exit function 'end if
dim idDPC : idDPC = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DPC, "ePubType=" + CStr(N5DPC_PUBTYPE_RAPORT_KASOWY)) if idDPC < 1 then idDPC = fire_choice_list( TYPEID_N5DPC , "Wydruk raportu kasowego" ,"strNazwa","ePubType=" + CStr(N5DPC_PUBTYPE_RAPORT_KASOWY) ,"","" ) if idDPC = 0 then exit function end if end if
realize_publication idDPC,trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RAPKAS,idOther),true,nothing exit function end if
MessageBox "Brak raportu kasowego dla podanej daty", "Zła data", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end function
function rozl_przych_tn() trans_.var(100) = "TERRANOVA" asp_raport_appfile 95227, nothing end function
function rozl_przych_rn() trans_.var(100) = "RINASCIMENTO" asp_raport_appfile 95227, nothing end function function rozl_przych_in() trans_.var(100) = "KOSMETYKI" asp_raport_appfile 95227, nothing end function
